title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners:
LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners!
